Speaking to the Teamofindia.com, Prasidh opens up on GT’s turnaround, the team’s hard-length bowling philosophy, Shubman Gill’s calm leadership and his own evolution after last season’s Purple Cap-winning campaign.

title: ‘Multiple antemortem injuries’: Chilling details emerge in Noida dowry death case
description: A retired district judge and her advocate son were booked in Bhopal for the alleged dowry death of the latter's wife, Twisha Sharma. Sharma was found hanging at her marital home, with her family alleging dowry harassment and murder. The retired judge has since been granted anticipatory bail.

title: After Trump’s Beijing visit, Taiwan detects Chinese naval vessels near its waters
description: Taiwan's defense ministry reported eight Chinese naval vessels near the island following US President Trump's China visit. Trump suggested China might act against Taiwan after his term, acknowledging Beijing's strong objections to its independence. The US arms package for Taiwan remains under review amid escalating tensions and China's territorial claims.

title: Petrol, diesel price hike: App based gig workers call for nationwide strike
description: Gig workers are staging a temporary nationwide strike, halting app-based services from 12 pm to 5 pm on Saturday. This protest, organized by GIPSWU, targets rising fuel prices and inadequate payment rates, which are significantly impacting drivers' daily earnings. The union aims to highlight the financial strain caused by increased fuel costs and low payouts.

He also suggested China would refrain from aggressive action on Taiwan during his presidency, while Xi Jinping privately warned of confrontation over the island. Trump indicated China's willingness to help broker an end to the Iran conflict.

title: Explained: CSK's qualification chances in IPL 2026 playoff race
description: With playoffs in sight, Gujarat Titans and Royal Challengers Bangalore are strong contenders, boasting high qualification probabilities. Sunrisers Hyderabad also hold a solid chance. Meanwhile, Punjab Kings and Rajasthan Royals have a decent shot, while Chennai Super Kings' prospects have dimmed. Kolkata Knight Riders and Delhi Capitals face slim hopes.

title: 4-year-old pulled out safely from borewell after 9-hour rescue operation in Punjab
description: A four-year-old boy was safely rescued from a newly dug borewell in Hoshiarpur, Punjab, after a challenging nine-hour operation. Multiple rescue agencies and local volunteers collaborated to pull the child out from a depth of 20 to 30 feet. The boy, who appeared stable after the rescue, was immediately taken to a hospital for examination.

title: Sri Lanka civil war: 17 years later, the imprints remain
description: Years after the civil war ended, the Tamils of Sri Lanka continue to face poverty, high unemployment, and land-takeovers. They believe that governments have done little to devise a comprehensive plan for the war-battered northern and eastern regions. While a generation of children is growing up with little understanding of the conflict, their parents are grappling with discrimination and deprivation, reports Meera Srinivasan

Born in the USA? MAGA hawks go after desi doc's 'delivery' service
description: A US congressional inquiry has launched a spotlight on maternity businesses, including a clinic operated by an Indian-origin physician, amid accusations of promoting 'birth tourism.' Legislators assert that the practice takes advantage of immigration laws, enabling international families to secure citizenship for their infants in the United States.

title: Bermuda Triangle mystery decoded: Scientists discover massive clue underwater
description: A remarkable geological discovery beneath Bermuda, a massive, unique rock layer, may finally explain the island's unusual elevation. Scientists used earthquake waves to reveal this 'life raft' structure, which has kept Bermuda afloat for millions of years, unlike other volcanic islands. While not solving Triangle myths, this real, measurable anomaly offers a fascinating new perspective.

title: BTS breaks silence on historic FIFA stage with message of hope and unity
description: BTS will make history as co-headliners of the first-ever halftime show at the 2026 FIFA World Cup final on July 19 in New York New Jersey Stadium. Sharing the stage with Madonna and Shakira, the group said the performance is a chance to spread “hope and harmony” worldwide. BTS also highlighted their desire to support children’s education through the FIFA Global Citizen campaign.

title: Meta's highest-paid employee is not happy with 'just money motivated' tag for his team
description: Meta SuperIntelligence Lab chief Alexandr Wang is pushing back on the idea that his team joined for the money. On the Core Memory podcast, Wang said the real draw was compute access, talent density, and research freedom—not the $100 million packages Meta reportedly offered. He also addressed the viral soup story involving Mark Zuckerberg and an OpenAI recruit.

title: Jannik Sinner and Laila Hasanovic’s 2026 net worth and earnings revealed
description: Jannik Sinner and Laila Hasanovic’s combined net worth in 2026 is estimated at around $35 million to $40 million. Most of that wealth comes from Sinner’s tennis prize money, ATP success, and endorsement deals with global brands. Hasanovic contributes through modeling, fashion partnerships, and social media promotions. Sinner’s growing success in international tennis continues driving the couple’s financial growth.
